title: Component Customization Contract v2
description: Contract declaring the freeze-line and the four config shapes a pre-rendered OCI component expects from the consumer (talos-platform-docs ADR-0024). Lives as customization.yaml next to the component's helm/ + manifests/ and ships with the OCI artifact. Supersedes the ADR-0023 v1 contract.

freeze_line.description: The workload/config boundary (ADR-0024). The workload is pre-rendered, signed, and never consumer-patched; config is 100% consumer-owned.

workload.description: Path to the pre-rendered, signed workload manifest the consumer never patches (conventionally rendered/manifest.yaml).

provided_refs.description: Names under which the rendered workload expects consumer-supplied config, by shape. Empty {} for cluster-agnostic components.

env.description: Shape (a): ConfigMap consumed via envFrom (12-factor env scalars). Convention <component>-runtime-config.

config.description: Shape (b): ConfigMap/Secret mounted as a whole config file the app reads. Convention <component>-config.

secret.description: Shape (c): Secret consumed via envFrom or mounted. Convention <component>-runtime-secret.

provided_selectors.description: Shape (d): for each operator-assembled config kind, the label set the consumer CRs must carry; the rendered consuming CR declares the matching selector. Empty {} when the component has no operator-assembled config.

additionalProperties.description: Label set (key/value) the consumer CRs must carry to match the workload selector.

required.description: What the consumer MUST supply, per shape. Empty lists = nothing (cluster-agnostic).

env_keys.description: Shape (a): scalar keys the consumer must set in the env ConfigMap (provided_refs.env).

config_files.description: Shape (b): full config files the consumer authors; the workload mounts each at its path.

path.description: Mount path the workload reads the file from.

ref.description: ConfigMap/Secret name carrying the file (matches provided_refs.config or .secret).

key.description: Key within the ref holding the file content.

secret_keys.description: Shape (c): keys the consumer must provide in the runtime secret (provided_refs.secret).

selector_crs.description: Shape (d): CRs the consumer must create and label so the operator assembles them.

kind.description: CR kind the consumer must create (e.g. ServiceMonitor, PrometheusRule).

label.description: Label set the CR must carry to match the rendered workload selector.

sync_wave.description: ArgoCD sync-wave as a string (pre-rendered into the manifest; a platform property, not a cluster property — the consumer does not patch it).

external_dependencies.description: Other components (<sub-layer>/<component>) that must exist in the same cluster before this one runs sensibly.
